# growthbook_namespace (Resource)

A GrowthBook namespace. Namespaces partition experiment traffic so that mutually exclusive experiments never overlap.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_namespace" "checkout" {
  display_name = "Checkout experiments"
  description  = "Mutually exclusive experiments on the checkout funnel"
  status       = "active"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name. Must be unique within the organization.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the namespace.
- `format` (String) Namespace format: `legacy` or `multiRange`. Defaults to `multiRange`. Immutable; changing this forces a new namespace.
- `hash_attribute` (String) The user attribute used for bucket hashing. Required when `format` is `multiRange`.
- `status` (String) Namespace status: `active` or `inactive`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique namespace identifier (e.g. `ns-...`).
- `seed` (String) The seed used for bucket hashing. Managed by GrowthBook.
